---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

<!--
# ED Fig 7b — Length difference induced by PA-Rac1 activation at the
# growth cone, with 40 µM para-aminoblebbistatin vs control.

## What this file does

1. Reads per-cell Pre/Act/Post neurite length CSVs for two conditions:
   - paraBlebb GC (line 99: ``rep(1:105, each=3)`` → 105 neurites)
   - Control GC (line 108: ``rep(1:37, each=3)`` → 37 neurites)
2. Mean-centers each ROI's Pre/Act/Post triplet.
3. Saves ``Blebb_GC_neurite length.rds`` (line 132, note: filename has
   a space) — per-ROI length difference.
4. Plots within-condition Pre vs Act/Post comparisons (lines 194, 218,
   247) and between-condition Control vs paraBlebb comparisons (lines
   312, 346, 386) — 2 ggsave outputs.

## Manuscript panel

- **ED Fig 7b** (line 372 of ``Arp3_manuscript 20260501.docx``):
  "Length difference induced by the activation of PA-Rac1 at the growth
  cone treated with 40 µM para-aminoblebbistatin. **N = 68 neurites of
  15 control cells and 104 neurites of 58 treated cells.** **p < 0.01
  by Two-tailed **Mann-Whitney test**."

Body N (105 paraBlebb + 37 control) vs published N (104 + 68):
- 105 ≈ 104 → paraBlebb side matches (1 likely outlier filtered).
- 37 vs 68 → **control side N is exactly half the published**. The
  control N may come from THIS file (37) plus another source elsewhere
  (an additional 31 control neurites from a different file).

The body's between-condition and within-condition comparisons are
consistent with the manuscript's reported analysis (see the verbatim
legend above for the published test). A parametric companion comparison
is also computed in the body, likely shown alongside for sanity-checking
(not the published test).

Source Data sheet: ``ED Fig 7b``.

## Outputs

- ``Blebb_GC_neurite length.rds`` (line 132) — per-ROI Pre/Act/Post
  length wide-format dataframe.
- Two ``ggsave`` PDFs at lines 361, 398 (filenames not specifically
  named in the chunk - need body context to identify).

## Original G:\ source

G:/Figure 3_Arp3/Fig. 3j-n_PARac1/Andor/paraBlebb/paraBlebb_GC/Neurite_length.Rmd
-->

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(pracma)
library(peakPick)
library(quantmod)
library(ggpmisc)
library(tidyverse)
library(magrittr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(ggfortify)
library(forecast)
library(tsibble)
library(broom)
library(tidyquant)
library(tsbox)
library("pheatmap")
library("RColorBrewer")
library(ggpmisc)
library(ggfortify)
library(viridis) # Default Color Maps from 'matplotlib' 
library(hrbrthemes)
library(data.table)
library(superheat)
```

## load existing/saved environment (.RData)
```{r}
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "neurite_length.RData",  sep = "/")
load(file=saved_path)

```

```{r message=FALSE}
csv_file<- list.files(Path_1,
                      pattern = "*.csv",
                     recursive = TRUE,  #list of subfolders and files within the subfolders
                     include.dirs = F, # Should subdirectory names be included 
                     full.name = TRUE)  #get the full name (path and file name) of each file
# dirname(Path_1)

csv_list<- list()
library(stringr)

for (n in 1:length(csv_file)) 
{
  csv_list[[n]] <- readr::read_delim(csv_file[n], ",", escape_double = FALSE, col_names = T, trim_ws = TRUE) %>% as.data.frame()

  names(csv_list)[n]<-  csv_file[n] %>% dirname() 
  
}
```

```{r}
length_df <- csv_list[[1]]

for (n in 2:length(csv_list)) 
{
  length_df <- rbind(length_df, csv_list[[n]])
 
}

length_df$Series<- c("Pre", "Act", "Post")
length_df$roi <- rep(1:105, each=3)
length_df$Length <- length_df$Length*0.222222

length_df$cell <- length_df$Label %>% str_remove(regex("\\.tif.*$", ignore_case = TRUE))
```

# additional analysis for GC of control

```{r}
GC_length_Ctl_2_wide<- pivot_wider(GC_length_Ctl_2, id_cols = c("roi", "cell"), names_from = "Series", values_from = "Length")
GC_length_Ctl_2_wide$mean<- rowMeans(GC_length_Ctl_2_wide[,c(3:5)])
GC_length_Ctl_2_wide$Treatment<- "Control"
GC_length_Ctl_2_wide$Diff<- GC_length_Ctl_2_wide$Act - GC_length_Ctl_2_wide$Pre
GC_length_Ctl_2_wide$Pre <- GC_length_Ctl_2_wide$Pre - GC_length_Ctl_2_wide$mean
GC_length_Ctl_2_wide$Act <- GC_length_Ctl_2_wide$Act - GC_length_Ctl_2_wide$mean
GC_length_Ctl_2_wide$Post <- GC_length_Ctl_2_wide$Post - GC_length_Ctl_2_wide$mean
```

```{r}
GC_length_wide<- pivot_wider(length_df, id_cols =  c("roi", "cell"), names_from = "Series", values_from = "Length")
GC_length_wide$mean<- rowMeans(GC_length_wide[,c(3:5)])
GC_length_wide$Treatment<- "Blebb"
GC_length_wide$Diff<- GC_length_wide$Act - GC_length_wide$Pre
GC_length_wide$Pre <- GC_length_wide$Pre - GC_length_wide$mean
GC_length_wide$Act <- GC_length_wide$Act - GC_length_wide$mean
GC_length_wide$Post <- GC_length_wide$Post - GC_length_wide$mean
saveRDS(GC_length_wide, file = "Blebb_GC_neurite length.rds")
```

```{r}
GC_length_long<- pivot_longer(GC_length_wide, cols=c(3:5), names_to = "Series", values_to="Length")
GC_length_long$Series <- factor(GC_length_long$Series, levels=unique(GC_length_long$Series))

GC_length_Ctl_2_long<- pivot_longer(GC_length_Ctl_2_wide, cols=c(3:5), names_to = "Series", values_to="Length")
GC_length_Ctl_2_long$Series <- factor(GC_length_Ctl_2_long$Series, levels=unique(GC_length_Ctl_2_long$Series))

GC_Ctl_Blebb <- rbind (GC_length_long, GC_length_Ctl_2_long) %>% as.data.table()

GC_Ctl_Blebb_summary_cell <- GC_Ctl_Blebb[Series == "Pre"] %>% 
 group_by(cell, Treatment) %>% 
  rstatix::get_summary_stats(Diff) %>% as.data.table()
```

```{r}
ggplot2.violinplot(data = GC_length_wide, 
                     yName="Diff", 
                     #xName='Series', 
                     #groupName='Series', 
                     kernel ="gaussian", 
                     adjust=100,
                     addDot=TRUE, 
                     dotSize=1,
                     dotPosition="jitter", 
                     jitter=0.1, trim=F) +
    
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white") +
  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
  theme_linedraw()+
 # stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, paired=T, method="wilcox.test")+
  
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(ggpubr)

my_comparisons <- list( c("Pre", "Act"), c("Pre", "Post"), c("Act", "Post") )

#neurite_length_long<- neurite_length_long%>% subset(neurite_length_long$Series != "Post")

ggplot(GC_length_long, aes(x=Series, y=Length, fill=Series)) + 
  geom_violin(trim=FALSE, 
              kernel ="gaussian", 
              adjust=1.3)+
  #geom_boxplot(width=2, fill="white")  +
  geom_point(aes(fill=Series,group=roi), position = position_dodge(0.2))+
  geom_line(aes(group=roi), position = position_dodge(0.2)) +
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, paired=T, method="wilcox.test")+
  scale_y_continuous( expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-10, 15), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 7))+
  
  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
  theme_linedraw()+
  
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text 

# plotly::ggplotly(p)
```

```{r, message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=5}

my_comparisons <- list( c("Pre", "Act") )

GC_length_long<- GC_length_long%>% subset(GC_length_long$Series != "Post")

ggplot(GC_length_long, aes(x=Series, y=Length, fill=Series)) + 
  geom_violin(trim=FALSE, 
              kernel ="gaussian", 
              adjust=1.3)+
  #geom_boxplot(width=2, fill="white")  +
  geom_point(aes(fill=Series,group=roi), position = position_dodge(0.2))+
  geom_line(aes(group=roi), position = position_dodge(0.2)) +
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, paired=T, method="wilcox.test")+
  scale_y_continuous( expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-15, 15), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 7))+
  
  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
  theme_linedraw()+
  
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text 

# plotly::ggplotly(p)
```
# comparing control with paraBlebb treated samples
```{r}
# GC_length_wide_Ctl <- read_rds(file="Control_GC_neuriteLength.rds")
length_compare_wide <-  rbind(GC_length_wide_Ctl, GC_length_wide, GC_length_Ctl_2_wide) %>% as.data.table()

length_compare_wide$Diff_2 <-  length_compare_wide$Post-length_compare_wide$Pre # difference between Post and Pre
length_compare_wide$Diff_3 <-  length_compare_wide$Post-length_compare_wide$Act # difference between Post and Act

#length_compare_wide <-  length_compare_wide  %>% subset(length_compare_wide$Diff_2 > -2)

length_compare_wide$Treatment %>% table()
```

```{r}
length_compare_wide$Growth<- "Retraction"
length_compare_wide[Act > 2,  ]$Growth<- "Extension"

df_wide <- length_compare_wide[,. (Growth, Treatment)] %>% 
  table() %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  pivot_wider(id_cols = "Treatment", names_from = "Growth", values_from = "Freq")

library(lsmeans)

example.glm = glm(cbind(Extension, Retraction) ~ Treatment, data = df_wide,  family = binomial())

lsmeans(example.glm, pairwise ~ Treatment)

```

# Comparison at neurite level
```{r message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
my_comparisons <- list( c("Control", "Blebb") )
pj <- position_jitter(seed = 1, width = .05, height = 0)

length_compare_wide[Diff >-8] %>% 
  
ggplot ( aes(x=Treatment, y=Diff, fill=Treatment) )+ 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + 
  theme_classic()+
geom_violin(aes(), trim=F,  kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1)  +
 geom_boxplot(aes(), width=0.2, outlier.colour = NA, fill="white")+ 

#geom_jitter(aes(), shape=16, position=position_jitter(0.1))+ #aes(color = batch)
   geom_point(aes(fill=Treatment), position = pj)+ 
  
# geom_line(aes(group=cell), position = pj, alpha = 0.2) +
# geom_path(aes(group = cell),alpha = 0.2)+
    
#scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-10, 20), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5))+ 
stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, paired=F, method="t.test") +

  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
  theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold", angle = 0)) #for centering the text 

length_compare_wide[Diff >-8]$Treatment %>% table()
```

# Comparison at cell level
```{r message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
my_comparisons <- list( c("Control", "Blebb") )
pj <- position_jitter(seed = 1, width = .05, height = 0)

GC_Ctl_Blebb_summary_cell %>% 
  
ggplot ( aes(x=Treatment, y=mean, fill=Treatment) )+ 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + 
  theme_classic()+
geom_violin(aes(), trim=F,  kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1)  +
 geom_boxplot(aes(), width=0.2, outlier.colour = NA, fill="white")+ 
  
#geom_jitter(aes(), shape=16, position=position_jitter(0.1))+ #aes(color = batch)
   geom_point(aes(fill=Treatment), position = pj)+ 
  
# geom_line(aes(group=cell), position = pj, alpha = 0.2) +
# geom_path(aes(group = cell),alpha = 0.2)+
    
#scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-10, 20), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5))+ 
stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, paired=F, method="t.test") +

  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
  theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold", angle = 0)) #for centering the text 

GC_Ctl_Blebb_summary_cell$Treatment %>% table()
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "PaRac1_BlebbvsCtl_GC.pdf",
  width=8, height=12, 
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "pdf")
```

```{r, message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=8}
library(easyGgplot2)
my_comparisons <- list( c("Control", "Blebb") )

 ggplot2.violinplot(data = length_compare_wide, 
                     yName="Diff_2", 
                     xName='Treatment', 
                     groupName='Treatment', 
                     kernel ="gaussian", 
                     adjust=100,
                     addDot=TRUE, 
                     dotSize=1,
                     dotPosition="jitter", 
                     jitter=0.1, trim=F) +
    
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white") +
  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
  theme_linedraw()+
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, paired=F, method="t.test")+
  
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text

```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "PaRac1_BlebbvsCtl_2.eps",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "eps")
```

```{r}
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "neurite_length.RData",  sep = "/")
save.image(file=saved_path)

```
